name: Content Zones
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Content zones makes it easy to add a tag into a source code of a page or listing design template on eBay to be displayed across all pages or listings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Best of all, if you need to update the information, it's stored in one location and is simple to update."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Content Zone"}], "data-id": "to-add-a-new-content-zone"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add a content zone, and populate it with information:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore > Content Zones", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a unique "}, {"text": "Zone Name / ID", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This is what you will use to reference the contact zone."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Content", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, you can enter HTML code by clicking on the "}, {"text": "Source Code", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab or click on the "}, {"text": "WYSIWYG Editor", "bold": true}, {"text": " to enter the content and it will generate the code for you."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones1.05T5g00000txATQEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones1.05T5g00000txATQEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once done, click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now insert the following tag anywhere in your templates or content pages for the content zone to appear:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[%content_zone id:'ZONEID'%][%end content_zone%]", "code": true}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Make sure you replace "}, {"text": "ZONEID", "bold": true}, {"text": " with your "}, {"text": "Zone Name / ID", "bold": true}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Example Uses"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the above example screenshot, we've are created a holiday message to our customers to display on our website. We named our content zone ID "}, {"text": "holiday_message", "bold": true}, {"text": ". So here is how the tag will look:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[%content_zone id:'holiday_message'%][%end content_zone%]", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this example, the content zone is being added to the about us page. To add this code to a webpage:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Information Page", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "About Us", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Page Content", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, paste the code into either the WSYIWYG Editor or source code and click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones2.05T5g00000txAUxEAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones2.05T5g00000txAUxEAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now if you view the front end of the website, you will now see the message."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones3.05T5g00000txAXhEAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContentZones3.05T5g00000txAXhEAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 246}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
